calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. VanSteenberge, CSR#1742. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-17-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Edward Nagy, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tack Z. Tseng, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Co-Defendant: Dontay G. Young
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Co-Defendant Dontay Young as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2049 Quesada Ave., 2nd Flr., San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

Defendant: Maricello Guerrero, present in pro per, settled and signed a stipulation for Judgment for back rent and damages, fees and costs, or for Dismissal if vacated by noon of June 18, 2007. Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, TRIAL vacated.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Set For Trial On Mar-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
